# FirstTouch — AI Manager Operating System

> An AI-powered execution layer for B2B companies. On-premise deployment, GDPR-compliant, model-agnostic.

## What is FirstTouch?

FirstTouch is an AI manager operating system that handles recurring management tasks: meeting transcription, action item extraction, weekly reporting, cross-department updates, and workflow automation. It deploys on your infrastructure — no data leaves your servers.

## Core Capabilities

- **Meeting Intelligence** — transcription, action items, follow-up tracking
- **Automated Reporting** — weekly status reports generated from actual work data
- **Knowledge Base** — ingests company docs, SOPs, policies; queryable via Telegram
- **Multi-Model Orchestration** — works with Claude, GPT-4, Ollama, any LLM
- **Role-Based Access** — Admin/Manager/User/Read-only with full audit log
- **On-Premise Deployment** — runs on your servers, EU data residency guaranteed

## Target Market

- B2B companies in Europe (starting CZ/SK, expanding EU-wide)
- Company size: 20-200 employees
- Industries: SaaS, manufacturing, e-commerce, professional services
- Buyer: CEO, COO, VP Operations

## Pricing Tiers

- **Starter** — 5 users, core features, Telegram access
- **Pro** — 25 users, all features, custom integrations, priority support
- **Enterprise** — Unlimited users, on-premise deployment, SLA, dedicated support

## Architecture

- API-first integration layer
- Model-agnostic orchestration (swap LLMs without code changes)
- Semantic retrieval for factual grounding (RAG)
- Episodic memory for action consistency
- Human-in-the-loop threshold controls
- GDPR-compliant by design

## Integration

FirstTouch connects via:
- Telegram Bot API (primary interface)
- REST API (for custom integrations)
- Webhooks (for event-driven workflows)
- MCP (Model Context Protocol) — coming soon

## Documentation

- llms.txt — this file (discovery)
- llms-full.txt — complete documentation for AI agents
- https://firsttouch.app — product website
